projects.name: Chinese Dictionary Software
projects.description: Developed a high-performance dictionary application for Windows and MacOS, handling large datasets (60,000 dictionary types). Optimized MySQL for data processing and querying. Implemented features like Hán, Hán-Việt, Pinyin lookup, stroke count, radical search, and conversion functions. Designed user-friendly UI/UX with customization options. Integrated AI models for Chinese character recognition and image-based input.

projects.name: E-commerce Website
projects.description: Designed responsive UI/UX for various devices (desktop, tablet, mobile). Developed core e-commerce features including product search, filtering, login, contact, chatbox, product posting, and a sales management dashboard. Optimized database architecture and SQL queries for efficient handling of user and product data.
